title: Rainbow Netherite
description:
This is NOT supposed to look Good!
It is purley for SPOTTING NETHERITE
body:
# Rainbow Netherite!
This resource pack is **NOT XRAY**
A very simple resouce pack to spot ancient debris while mining.

Maybe you missed some netherite because fire was blocking it, maybe it looked like soul sand or  its hard to spot.

With this resource pack you will be able to see any and every ancient debris ore in the nether!

This resource pack only changes the texture of ancient debris so you can have all your other resource packs and this will not interfere!

- keep in mind that this resource pack can make ancient debris look bad
